$comment: scripts/CinnabarIsland.asm CinnabarIslandDefaultScript — without the SECRET KEY, standing on the tile below the Gym door bounces you straight back: a MovePlayerDownScript (face up, 'The door is locked...', one simulated PAD_DOWN), so you never step onto the door warp itself (gh #172). With the key this record's gate fails and the door warp works normally.
